About Duke Control Systems

Duke Control Systems is a UK-based industrial automation company led by former hands-on robot programmers, software engineers and project managers — people who have delivered real projects, not just managed them.

Who We Are

Meet Duke Control Systems

With over 50 years of combined leadership experience, Duke Control Systems is a UK-based automation company led by former hands-on robot programmers, software engineers, and project managers — people who have delivered real projects, not just managed them from the sidelines.

Our leadership's deep technical expertise and proven project management skills have successfully delivered a wide variety of projects globally, including automotive BIW projects in excess of 200 robots, airport baggage handling systems, and complex processing facilities.

We offer a full spectrum of automation services: process engineering, electrical design, control and power panel manufacturing, PLC programming using leading platforms (Siemens, Rockwell, Mitsubishi, Schneider, Modicon), robot programming, and advanced simulation and virtual commissioning.

At Duke Control Systems, we place utmost importance on integrity and reliability — doing exactly what we say we will do, when we say we will do it. This commitment to keeping our word is the foundation of our trusted client relationships.

With our offices located in Birmingham City Centre we are well placed to provide turnkey projects and service contracts nationwide by being right in the middle of the country.
